meta_title: Our Puppy Breeds | 7 Breeds, One Honest Match | Curious Tails
meta_description: Cavapoo to Corgi: browse the 7 puppy breeds at Curious Tails Singapore, each $2,888 to $4,488 all-in. HDB status, lifestyle fit, and honest matching advice.
h1: Cavapoo to Corgi: Choose Your Perfect Puppy

entity_definitions.definition: Curious Tails is an AVS licensed pet shop at 2 Balestier Road (licence AS24J00046) carrying seven breeds, all $2,888 to $4,488 all-in, matched to buyers by lifestyle.

Choosing a puppy breed in Singapore comes down to three questions: is the breed HDB-approved if you live in a flat, how many hours will it be alone each day, and how much grooming and exercise fit your week. The right breed is the one that fits the answers, not the photos.

top_competitor_weaknesses: category grids with zero fit guidance
no HDB flags on breed cards
unanswered_followup_questions: Which breed for a working couple?

all: who is home during the day
we ask about your routine first

lsi_keyword_weighting.instruction: Cards carry transactional; the selector table carries informational.

content_outline.heading: Match by your day, not the photo

faq.question: Which breeds do you carry?
faq.answer_direction: Seven: Cavapoo, Maltipoo, Mini Dachshund, Corgi, Shiba Inu, Bichonpoo, Cockapoo, all $2,888 to $4,488 all-in.

faq.question: Which of your breeds are HDB-approved?
faq.answer_direction: Cavapoo, Maltipoo, Mini Dachshund, Bichonpoo and Cockapoo yes; Corgi and Shiba Inu no (private housing only).

faq.question: Which breed suits a working couple?
faq.answer_direction: Cavapoo, Mini Dachshund or Shiba Inu (private housing) cope best with an 8am to 6pm absence; Maltipoo and Bichonpoo need company.

faq.question: Do all breeds cost the same?
faq.answer_direction: All sit in the same published $2,888 to $4,488 range; the individual puppy's coat, colour and age set the exact figure.

faq.question: Can you help us choose?
faq.answer_direction: That is the whole point: message us your routine or take the two-minute quiz, and we will tell you straight, including which breed NOT to get.

faq.question: Can we meet the breeds in person?
faq.answer_direction: Yes, at 2 Balestier Road; WhatsApp first so the right puppies are ready.
